listing.name: Rivera Mobile Auto Repair
listing.tagline: Mobile auto repair serving Salinas, Prunedale, and North Monterey County.
services: Brake pads, rotors, and fluid service
highlights: No tow needed — work done in your driveway or parking lot
Most jobs same-day when booked before noon
18 years ASE-style experience; former dealership tech
Flat-rate quotes given before any work starts

snippets: Marco came out to my apartment and swapped my alternator in under two hours. Saved me a tow.
Straightforward, honest pricing. Texted me the diagnostic codes before quoting.
Showed up on time and cleaned up after. Will call him for every car issue from now on.

ingested.notes: Hand-pasted plausible listing for the first vertical slice. Swap by editing this file and running `npm run generate`.

copy.headline: Rivera Mobile Auto Repair | No Tow Needed
copy.subheadline: Marco Rivera offers on-site auto repairs for Salinas, Prunedale, Marina, Castroville, and Gonzales. Book before noon for same-day service.
copy.aboutParagraph: With 18 years of ASE-style experience as a former dealership tech, Marco Rivera provides reliable mobile auto repair services in your driveway or parking lot. Flat-rate quotes are given upfront to ensure transparency.
copy.ctaBody: We've already built this website. Click now to secure the flat rate offer and get professional mobile auto repair services online.
copy.trustLine: No hidden fees — you pay only $499 for a fully functional one-page website.
